articles.title: Red Sox win 7th straight game just hours after landing in New York
articles.description:
Sonny Gray once again led the way on the bump for Boston.

The post Red Sox win 7th straight game just hours after landing in New York appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox secured their 7th consecutive victory against the Mets in New York.
Sonny Gray excelled on the mound, contributing to the team's winning streak.
This win boosts Boston's morale and playoff hopes among local fans.
